pages.text: Above recipe level 8, generated slots may have $(term)special types$() that alter reactions. Their chance and number grow with level. Some hide their type until their first annihilation.

pages.title: Order Is Part of the Formula
pages.text: Slots resolve in the order their essences were inserted. A slot can affect only neighbors that have already produced an output—or inhibit neighbors still empty—so filling 1 then 2 may differ completely from filling 2 then 1.

pages.title: Basic Modifiers
pages.text: $(li)$(term)Normal$(): the basic relation reaction.$(li)$(term)Deterioration$(): product -1; polarity +1.$(li)$(term)Activation$(): product +1; polarity -1.$(li)$(term)Inversion$(): reverses state and polarity changes.$(li)$(term)Restoration$(): a matching essence annihilates but is retained.

pages.title: Diffusion and Inhibition
pages.text: $(li)$(term)Diffusion$(): passes its activation or deterioration to adjacent produced, uninhibited outputs; polarity applies for each spread.$(li)$(term)Inhibition$(): if it does not annihilate, adjacent empty slots are inhibited. Their later non-annihilation changes to state, polarity, and entropy become ineffective.

pages.title: Purge and Resonance
pages.text: $(li)$(term)Purge$(): if its product deteriorates, clears adjacent existing products without counting them as annihilated.$(li)$(term)Resonance$(): adds the states of adjacent existing products to itself, counting Nigredo, base, Albedo, and Citrinitas as -1, 0, 1, and 2.

pages.title: Directional Slots
pages.text: An arrow is hidden with the slot type and appears once revealed.$(br2)$(li)$(term)Activity$(): if not annihilated, reacts once more with the arrow's adjacent existing product; the extra reaction does not change polarity.$(li)$(term)Exchange$(): swaps products with that neighbor.

pages.title: Delayed Disturbances
pages.text: $(li)$(term)Spin$(): after all reactions, rotates adjacent non-empty products clockwise.$(li)$(term)Unstable$(): if its essence changes state, swaps its type with a random other slot after all reactions.$(br2)Recheck the HUD after either disturbance.

pages.title: Using Them Well
pages.text: Special slots are not merely obstacles. Resonance and Activity benefit from resolving after useful neighbors; Purge, Spin, Exchange, and Inhibition demand care with order. Reveal types, plan a route, then feed the crucible deliberately.
